---
title: "Pupils of St. John the Divine, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”"
---

## Pupils of St. John the Divine, The By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.”

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1868
**Genre:** Non-fiction: history
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

Macmillan’s Sunday Library (originally the Sunday Library for Household Reading) was published in monthly parts at 1<i>s.</i> each (of which the <i>Pupils</i> formed the first 3 parts) and quarterly volumes at 4<i>s.</i> each (of which it formed volume I).

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
